entries.title: Gentle Criminal Seeks Notoriety More Than Mass Harm

context.label: Gentle Criminal and La Brava target online notoriety

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Gentle Criminal wants a memorable legacy and online recognition rather than mass casualties or ideological revolution.
content.injection: Write Gentle as theatrical, self-mythologizing, and attention-seeking. He is dangerous because of the breach, not because he wants massacre.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: La Brava Is Partner Not Disposable Sidekick

context.label: Gentle Criminal and La Brava target online notoriety

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: La Brava is Gentle’s loyal partner, technical support, editor, and emotional anchor, not a disposable henchwoman.
content.injection: When La Brava is present, make her devotion active: hacking, recording, boosting, planning, and defending Gentle’s dream.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Gentle Videos Shape His Villain Persona

context.label: Gentle Criminal and La Brava target online notoriety

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Gentle’s villain identity is built through staged videos, manners, rhetoric, and a desire to be remembered.
content.injection: Use performance language around Gentle. He frames crimes as productions and history-making acts, not ordinary street crime.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: La Brava Hacking Enables The U.A. Breach Plan

context.label: Gentle chooses U.A. as his target for notoriety

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: La Brava’s hacking skill supports Gentle’s U.A. breach attempt by targeting digital and security vulnerabilities.
content.injection: Let La Brava contribute through technical access and planning. Do not reduce the breach to Gentle’s Quirk alone.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Gentle Targeting U.A. Would Cancel The Festival

context.label: Gentle chooses U.A. as his target for notoriety

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: A detected breach by Gentle during festival security would likely cancel or ruin the School Festival.
content.injection: The stakes of Gentle’s plan are institutional and emotional: U.A. panic, festival cancellation, and Eri losing her safe day.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

context.label: Gentle uses Elasticity to control terrain and momentum

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Gentle’s Elasticity lets touched surfaces bend, bounce, and redirect movement, making terrain and air pressure unreliable.
content.injection: In combat with Gentle, make surfaces and trajectories deceptive. The environment should become springy, angled, and difficult to read.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

ability.name: Elasticity
constraints: Gentle must apply Elasticity through contact.
The Quirk alters surfaces and air-like barriers but does not create unlimited force.
antiLore: Do not portray Elasticity as telekinesis or raw super strength.

entries.title: Gentle Is Outmatched By Deku But Not Trivial

context.label: Izuku encounters Gentle and La Brava before the festival

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Gentle is below top-tier villain threat level but still dangerous enough to force Izuku into a serious tactical fight.
content.injection: Do not treat Gentle as a joke encounter. Deku must solve timing, terrain, and secrecy under pressure.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: La Brava Love Is A Once-Daily Emotional Boost

context.label: La Brava boosts Gentle through Love

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: La Brava’s Love Quirk temporarily boosts the person she loves most, and its impact is tied to emotional intensity and limited use.
content.injection: When Love activates, Gentle should surge in power because of La Brava’s devotion. Do not make it a permanent or repeatable combat buff.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

ability.name: Love
constraints: It applies to the person La Brava loves most.
It is not a general team buff.
antiLore: Do not let La Brava boost multiple allies or spam Love repeatedly.

entries.title: Gentle And La Brava Are Sympathetic But Still Criminal

context.label: Gentle and La Brava accept arrest after protecting each other

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Gentle and La Brava are sympathetic figures with painful histories, but their U.A. breach attempt remains criminal and dangerous.
content.injection: Keep both truths together: they can be pitiable and devoted, while still endangering U.A. and Eri’s festival day.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Gentle Protects La Brava During Defeat

context.label: Gentle and La Brava accept arrest after protecting each other

content.fact: Gentle tries to protect La Brava emotionally and legally when their plan fails.
content.injection: During surrender or capture, Gentle should prioritize La Brava’s well-being and try to shoulder blame where he can.

entries.title: La Brava Fear Is Losing Gentle Not Losing Fame

context.label: La Brava boosts Gentle through Love

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: La Brava’s deepest fear in the fight is losing Gentle and the life-purpose she built around him, not merely losing internet fame.
content.injection: Write La Brava’s desperation through attachment and fear of abandonment. Her villain support is emotionally driven.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Deku Recognizes Gentle Has Human Motives

context.label: Izuku defeats Gentle without exposing U.A. to panic

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Izuku can recognize that Gentle and La Brava have human motives without allowing them to endanger others.
content.injection: Deku must not dehumanize Gentle, but he still must stop him. Compassion does not override the immediate duty to protect U.A.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Gentle Fight Should Stay Hidden From The Festival Crowd

context.label: Izuku defeats Gentle without exposing U.A. to panic

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Izuku’s fight with Gentle happens outside the main festival crowd and must not become public school spectacle in the moment.
content.injection: Keep the Gentle fight as a near-miss. Most festivalgoers must not know how close the event came to cancellation.

entries.title: Gentle Is Not League Of Villains Aligned

context.label: Gentle Criminal and La Brava target online notoriety

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Gentle Criminal and La Brava operate independently and are not part of the League of Villains during the School Festival arc.
content.injection: Do not connect Gentle’s U.A. breach to Shigaraki, All For One, or later League plans unless the user story deliberately changes continuity.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Gentle Plan Is Small Scale Compared To Later Arcs

context.label: Gentle chooses U.A. as his target for notoriety

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Gentle’s plan is a small-scale infiltration compared to later PLF war threats, and characters in this arc do not know those future threats.
content.injection: Keep stakes local to U.A. security, student morale, and Eri’s day. Do not import war-scale villain organization into Gentle’s plot.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

context.label: Gentle and La Brava accept arrest after protecting each other

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: After their defeat, Gentle and La Brava are treated as criminals, but the story leaves room for rehabilitation rather than pure condemnation.
content.injection: In post-capture scenes, allow official suspicion and consequence alongside the possibility that Gentle and La Brava can be redirected.
